name: beanz-daily-digest
description: Daily, weekly, and monthly intelligence digest for beanz.com — Breville Group's specialty coffee subscription marketplace. Pulls from 7 sources: Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, Slack, Jira, Mixpanel (with 17 exact query schemas), and BeanzGenie (Databricks). Includes cross-source intelligence synthesis, full email/doc content extraction, and meeting transcript support.
